newQuiz.stem: If it ___ so heavily yesterday, we could have finished the hiking trail, but we had to turn back halfway.
newQuiz.explanation: yesterday 與主句 could have finished 顯示與『過去』事實相反,if 子句須用過去完成式;否定即 hadn't rained。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ 主句是 could have + p.p.(與過去相反),if 子句必須用 had p.p.;didn't rain 是與現在相反的時態,時間詞 yesterday + could have 已鎖定過去完成。

newQuiz.stem: She talks as if she ___ the whole story, but actually she only heard part of it.
newQuiz.explanation: as if 引導與『現在』事實相反(她其實不全知道),主句現在式 talks,從句用過去式 knew。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ as if 後與現在相反用過去式 knew;had known 是與過去相反。主句 talks(現在式)且 actually she only hears 為現在情境,不可往前推到過去完成。

newQuiz.stem: ___ it not for your timely help, the whole project would have collapsed last month.
newQuiz.explanation: Were it not for = If it were not for(要不是…),這是與事實相反假設句省略 if 的倒裝固定句型。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ 'Were it not for' 是固定倒裝句(=If it were not for),雖主句 would have collapsed 像過去,但 be 動詞倒裝仍用 Were;Had 需搭配 it not been for 才成立。

newQuiz.stem: Look at the dark clouds. It's high time we ___ home before the storm hits.
newQuiz.explanation: It's (high) time + 主詞 + 過去式,表『早該做卻還沒做』,屬假設語氣,用 went。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ 'It's time/high time + S + 過去式' 是固定假設句型,動詞用過去式 went 表現在該做;雖語意指當下,卻不可用現在式 go 或 will go。

newQuiz.stem: My teacher suggested that every student ___ a draft before the final report is due.
newQuiz.explanation: suggest 等表建議/要求動詞後的 that 子句用『(should) + 原形』,故用原形 submit。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ suggest/insist/demand 後 that 子句用 (should) 原形,動詞用 submit 不隨主詞 every student 加 s;這是假設語氣的『建議型』,別誤用第三人稱單數 submits。

newQuiz.stem: If I ___ about the traffic jam earlier, I would be sitting in the meeting room right now instead of stuck on the highway.
newQuiz.explanation: 混合假設:if 子句指過去(早知道)用 had known,主句指現在 would be sitting,故 if 用過去完成。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ 這是混合假設句:過去的條件(earlier→had known)+ 現在的結果(right now→would be sitting);if 子句看『過去』線索 earlier,須用 had known 而非 knew。

newQuiz.stem: If you ___ to lend me the money now, I would be able to pay the deposit and we could move in next week.
newQuiz.explanation: 與現在事實相反,if 子句用過去式;be 動詞一律用 were(were to 表將來不太可能的假設)。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ if 子句 be 動詞假設語氣固定用 were(連 you 也是);主句 would be able to 為與現在相反,排除 are(直說)與 had been(與過去相反)。

newQuiz.stem: Without the help of GPS, the rescue team ___ the lost climbers in such thick fog.
newQuiz.explanation: Without = If it had not been for(救援已完成,屬過去),主句用 would have + p.p. 的否定 wouldn't have found。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ Without 在此等於與『過去』相反的假設(救援已成功的事實),主句須 would have found;wouldn't find 是與現在相反,別忽略已完成的過去情境。

newQuiz.stem: If he had taken my advice back then, he ___ such a serious mistake and lost his job.
newQuiz.explanation: if 子句 had taken(與過去相反),且 lost his job 是過去結果,主句用 wouldn't have made。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ if 子句已是 had p.p. 且後文 lost his job 指過去,主句必須對應 would have made;wouldn't make 是與現在相反,時態不一致。

newQuiz.stem: I would rather you ___ anything about this to my parents; it would only worry them.
newQuiz.explanation: would rather + 主詞 + 過去式,表對現在/未來的願望(寧願你別說),用過去式 didn't say。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ 'would rather + S + 過去式' 表對現在或未來的偏好,用 didn't say;hadn't said 是對過去的遺憾。此處 it would only worry them 指未來,故非過去完成。

newQuiz.stem: Should you ___ any difficulty installing the software, please contact our support team immediately.
newQuiz.explanation: Should + 主詞 + 原形 = If you should…(萬一),為與未來假設的倒裝句,用原形 meet。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ 'Should you meet…' = If you should meet…(倒裝省略 if),Should 後接原形動詞 meet;別因 Should 像過去而填 met,倒裝助動詞後一律接原形。

newQuiz.stem: If the witness had told the truth, the innocent man ___ in prison now.
newQuiz.explanation: 混合假設:過去的條件(had told)+ 現在的結果 now,主句用 would + 原形 be。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ 混合句型:if 指過去(had told),主句因有 now 指現在,用 wouldn't be(would+原形);別因 if 子句是過去完成就反射填 wouldn't have been。

newQuiz.stem: But for your generous donation, the old library ___ down years ago.
newQuiz.explanation: But for = If it had not been for(要不是),years ago 指過去,主句用 would have + p.p.。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ But for(=Without)在此搭配 years ago 為與過去相反,主句用 would have shut down;would shut 是與現在相反,時間詞 years ago 已鎖定過去。

newQuiz.stem: I wish I ___ taller; then I could reach the top shelf without a stool.
newQuiz.explanation: wish + 與現在事實相反,be 動詞用 were(對現在身高的願望);then I could 指現在。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ wish 表與『現在』相反用 were(be 動詞固定 were);had been 是與過去相反。後句 could reach 指當下能力,故非過去完成。

newQuiz.stem: If only I ___ my passport at home, we wouldn't be missing our flight at this very moment.
newQuiz.explanation: 混合假設:過去的動作(leave 護照)用 had left,主句現在結果 wouldn't be missing,故否定 hadn't left。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ 'If only' 用法同 wish；此為混合句:過去把護照留在家(hadn't left)導致現在趕不上(at this moment);if 子句指過去動作須用過去完成。

newQuiz.stem: The coach insisted that the injured player ___ for the rest of the season to fully recover.
newQuiz.explanation: insist(堅持要求)後 that 子句用 (should) + 原形,故用原形 rest。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ insist 表『要求』時 that 子句用 (should) 原形 rest，不加 s 也不用過去式;若 insist 表『堅稱事實』才用直說,此處 to recover 顯示是要求語氣。

newQuiz.stem: Had the government acted sooner, thousands of lives ___ during the flood.
newQuiz.explanation: Had the government acted = If the government had acted(與過去相反倒裝),主句用 could have been + p.p.(被動)。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ 倒裝 Had…acted 為與過去相反,主句須 could have been saved(完成被動);could be saved 是與現在相反,且 lives 與 save 為被動關係不可漏 been。

newQuiz.stem: If you were to find a wallet on the street, what ___ you do with it?
newQuiz.explanation: were to 表將來不太可能發生的純假設,主句用 would + 原形;故用 would。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ 'were to' 強調與將來相反的假設,主句助動詞用 would 不可用 will(will 屬可能成真的條件句);這是純假設提問,與真實未來條件區分。

newQuiz.stem: She acted as though nothing ___, even though the accident had clearly upset her deeply.
newQuiz.explanation: as though 引導與『過去』事實相反(事故已發生卻裝沒事),主句過去式 acted,從句須往前推用過去完成 had happened。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ as though 後若指比主句更早的『過去』須用過去完成 had happened;主句 acted 是過去式，事故早已發生(the accident had upset her)，故非單純過去式 happened。

newQuiz.stem: Suppose you ___ the lottery tomorrow, would you quit your job right away?
newQuiz.explanation: Suppose 引導假設,搭配主句 would quit(與現在/將來相反的純假設),從句用過去式 won。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ Suppose/Supposing 等於 if,主句 would quit 顯示為純假設,從句用過去式 won;雖有 tomorrow，但 would 表不太可能成真，故非現在式 win。

newQuiz.stem: If our team had not lost focus in the final minutes, we ___ the championship that everyone expected us to win.
newQuiz.explanation: if 子句 had not lost(與過去相反),比賽已結束,主句用 could/would have + p.p.,故 could have won。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ if 子句 had not lost + 過去情境(expected us to win),主句須 could have won(與過去相反);would win/can win 是現在或可能語氣，與已結束的比賽矛盾。
